scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.deploy:staging: VITE_APP_ENV=staging npm run build && tf -chdir=./infrastructure init && (tf -chdir=./infrastructure workspace select staging || tf -chdir=./infrastructure workspace new staging) && tf -chdir=./infrastructure apply -auto-approve -var="env=staging"
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && tf -chdir=./infrastructure init && (tf -chdir=./infrastructure workspace select prod || tf -chdir=./infrastructure workspace new prod) && tf -chdir=./infrastructure apply -auto-approve -var="env=prod"
